login.subtitle: Login to access your inventory dashboard
login.error_missing: Please enter both email and password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your inventory efficiently with real-time tracking, smart alerts, and comprehensive analytics.
dashboard.chart_desc: Tracking total stock IN/OUT transactions over the past 7 days

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.subtitle: Manage your stock, generate codes, and track usage.

modals.category_hint: Search an existing category, or type to create a new one.
modals.trade_name_placeholder: Search or create a trade name...
modals.trade_name_hint: Search an existing trade name, or type to create a new one.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: View and filter all inventory stock movement records.
transactions.quick_scan_desc: Scan barcodes to automatically dispense 1 item

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, preferences, and system configuration.
settings.theme_desc: Toggle between light and dark mode

qr.hint: Scan this code to quickly pull up the item or record IN/OUT transactions.

barcode.title: Item Barcode (Code 128)
barcode.hint: Scan this Code 128 barcode with any barcode scanner to instantly look up this item or record IN/OUT transactions.

scanner.title: Camera Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Point camera at a barcode or QR code
scanner.scanning: 🔍 Scanning — align barcode within the frame
scanner.camera_error: Could not access camera. Please try again.
scanner.permission_denied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
scanner.no_camera: No camera found on this device.
scanner.hint_handheld: Handheld scanner ready — scan any barcode to instantly look up an item or pre-fill a new item form.
scanner.toast_notfound: New barcode — opening add item form
scanner.prefill_notice: Barcode pre-filled from scanner — this item was not found in inventory.

validation.serial_min: Serial number must be at least 3 characters.
validation.threshold_min: Low stock threshold must be at least 1.
validation.positive_integer: Please enter a valid positive whole number.
validation.exceeds_stock: Cannot dispatch more than current stock ({{stock}}).
validation.qty_hint: Enter the quantity to add to stock
validation.price_required: Unit price is required for new items.
validation.price_invalid: Price must be a valid number (0 or greater).

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.description: Monitor and review automated system warnings.
alerts.no_alerts: There are no required actions or low stock items right now.
alerts.low_stock_msg: has dropped completely below the established safe minimum stock threshold.

restock.scan_match: Barcode matched an existing item in your inventory.

batch.title: Batch Management
batch.create_new_desc: Specify custom expiry date for this restock.
batch.choose_desc: Select an existing batch or create a new batch with a custom expiry.
